title: AI is genuinely brilliant
author: Niceguysfx
selftext:
Simple yet consistent. You can build this too, get a basic plan with whatever AI platform you prefer, teach it your strategy and get a fully functional scanner.   
2026 is going to be crazy

comments.author: ChartGhost
comments.body: How can we build this what did you use

replies.author: Niceguysfx
replies.body: i used gemini as well as my own trading knowledge. You've just got to ensure you cover all your bases. Don't assume AI knows something or understands what you "mean", give it clear instructions with well defined rules

replies.author: ChartGhost
replies.body: Ok that's cool, I have asked chat gpt to help me to create an early with mt5 but when I compile it, it has so many errors and when I give chat the errors and ask to fix it isn't able to after so many attempts, I can't seem to get the EA to react to the live market, they work well when you backrest it but then on live market it does not react the same as the back test, what type of prompt would you give Gemini to make this bot? And is it still made with mql5

replies.author: Niceguysfx
replies.body:
My funded is up over 2% this week.   
Personal smaller account has grown 17% this month.   
Im also spending less time looking at charts.   
So overall the results have been good

comments.author: StevenVinyl
comments.body: looks pretty good, you should prob check out Cod3x to see how this can go up to a whole new level

comments.author: Clean_Bottle_1472
comments.body: OP I have lost some money in grid bot trading, do you think you can help test your strategy on a demo account?

replies.author: Niceguysfx
replies.body:
sorry maybe my post was misleading. This isnt an automated trading bot. I get alerts of, OB's, liquidity sweeps and fair value gaps on higher timeframes.   
Then i get confirmation alerts on lower timeframes and thats when i execute.   
Besides the alerts, its still manual trading
